chapter_title.en: Chapter on Voluntary Fasting and Its Rewards on Different Days

text: 1802 - وَ رَوَى جَابِرٌ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «مَنْ خُتِمَ لَهُ بِصِيَامِ يَوْمٍ دَخَلَ اَلْجَنَّةَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1802 - It is narrated by Jabir from Abu Ja‘far (Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as)), who said:
"Whoever's life ends while fasting on a day will enter Paradise."
